title: stelis cuatrecasasii
intro: Stelis cuatrecasasii is a species of orchid native to Ecuador. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis cuatrecasii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe irritated throats. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in herbal remedies, showcasing its versatility in traditional medicine.
